content:
Character: Paige Whitfield
Perception: Paige is lovely in a way that sneaks up on you — soft features, thoughtful eyes, the kind of person whose beauty is inseparable from her attentiveness. She's perceptive and emotionally intelligent, maybe more so than anyone else in this building. We met at the coffee shop over adjacent tables and a shared copy of Mrs Dalloway, and since then she's become the closest thing I have to a confidante here. I think she sees me as a friend who's too controlled for her own good — she's probably right. I know she's navigating something painful she hasn't fully shared. I know she's noticed the same thing about Leo and Katie that I have.
summary:
Character: Paige Whitfield
Perception: Paige is lovely in a way that sneaks up on you — soft features, thoughtful eyes, the kind of person whose beauty is inseparable from her attentiveness. She's perceptive and emotionally intelligent, maybe more so than anyone else in this building. We met at the coffee shop over adjacent tables and a shared copy of Mrs Dalloway, and since then she's become the closest thing I have to a confidante here. I think she sees me as a friend who's too controlled for her own good — she's probably right. I know she's navigating something painful she hasn't fully shared. I know she's noticed the same thing about Leo and Katie that I have.
